/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -Wno-comment -O3 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libMeshFEM.dylib -install_name @rpath/libMeshFEM.dylib CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/BoundaryConditions.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/EdgeFields.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/Eigensolver.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/FieldSampler.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/GaussQuadrature.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/GlobalBenchmark.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/Materials.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/MeshIO.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/MSHFieldParser.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/Parallelism.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/Parametrization.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/StringUtils.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/Types.cc.o CMakeFiles/MeshFEM.dir/newton_optimizer/newton_optimizer.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/build-py310/3rdparty/MeshFEM/tbb ../../../triangle/libtriangle.a ../../../libmeshfem_tinyexpr.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libumfpack.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcholmod.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcolamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libccolamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_program_options.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib ../../../tbb/libtbbmalloc.dylib ../../../tbb/libtbb.dylib
